title: $100k Seller Financing l Cleaning Business | $172K Net
reasonForSelling: Owner pursuing relocation and a new business venture.
supportTraining: Seller will provide transition support to ensure a smooth handover, including training on service processes, customer management, scheduling systems, vendor relationships, and operational best practices.
description:
Sellers are also willing to accept an all-cash offer of $250k.

This is a rare opportunity to acquire a fast-growing, highly profitable exterior and specialty cleaning services business with exceptional margins and a proven operating model. Established in 2024, the company has scaled rapidly, serving more than 700 clients and achieving outstanding financial performance in its first full year of operation.

The business specializes in high-demand services, including residential and commercial window cleaning, pressure washing, and comprehensive exterior cleaning solutions. Its mobile, service-based model eliminates the need for a physical storefront, resulting in extremely low overhead and strong bottom-line performance.

They have built an outstanding reputation in their market, supported by 118 five-star online reviews, strong word-of-mouth referrals, and consistent customer satisfaction. This reputation drives organic lead flow and repeat business, creating predictable revenue throughout the year.

Financially, the business generated approximately $285,201 in gross revenue with an impressive net income of $182,239, reflecting exceptional margins for a service-based operation. The lean cost structure, efficient labor utilization, and strong pricing power allow incremental revenue to flow efficiently to the bottom line.
